auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access the admin dashboard

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage catalog, stock, orders, shipping, and customers of the store.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: Create, edit and organize products and their variants.

ordersCustomers.title: Orders & Customers
ordersCustomers.description: (Future sections) Track orders, customers and fulfillment.

stockInventory.title: Stock & Inventory
stockInventory.description: (Future sections) Update stocks per variant and manage alerts.
stockInventory.lowStockComingSoon: Products at risk of running out of stock (coming soon)

pricingPromotions.title: Prices, Promotions & Coupons
pricingPromotions.description1: (Future sections) Manage base price + sale price per variant, promotions and coupons.
pricingPromotions.description2: (Future sections) Schedule promotions by date (e.g., Black Friday, summer sales)
pricingPromotions.description3: (Future sections) Coupon management: percentage, fixed amount, free shipping, minimum order value, expiration.
pricingPromotions.description4: (Future sections) Simple rules such as: "X% off on the 'family games' category."

shippingLogistics.title: Shipping & Logistics
shippingLogistics.description1: (Future sections) Configuration of shipping zones (Chile: Metropolitan Region, other regions, remote areas, etc.)
shippingLogistics.description2: (Future sections) Rates: flat, by weight, by order total
shippingLogistics.description3: (Future sections) Integrations or at least data export for couriers (Chilexpress, Starken, etc.)
shippingLogistics.description4: (Future sections) Field for shipment tracking number and tracking link.

contentPages.title: Content & Pages (mini CMS)
contentPages.description1: (Future sections) Edit key texts: return policy, terms and conditions, FAQs
contentPages.description2: (Future sections) Banners and promotional messages on the home page ("Free shipping on orders over $X")

reportsAnalytics.title: Reports & basic analytics
reportsAnalytics.description1: (Future sections) Even if you later use GA/Looker/etc., the admin should at least show:
reportsAnalytics.description2: (Future sections) Banners and promotional messages on the home page ("Free shipping on orders over $X")
reportsAnalytics.salesComingSoon: Sales per day / week / month (coming soon)

products.title: Products
products.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

productsTable.title: Products
productsTable.description: Manage the products and view their sales performance.
productsTable.name: Name

brands.title: Brands
brands.noBrands: No brands found. Add your first brand!
brands.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
brands.cannotDeleteWithProducts: This brand has {count} associated product(s). Please reassign or remove them before deleting this brand.
brands.slugExists: A brand with this slug already exists

physicalAttributes.title: Physical attributes
physicalAttributes.description: Weight, dimensions, and packaging used for shipping and feed integrations.

storeLinks.title: Store links for this variant
storeLinks.description: Paste the full URL of this variant in each store. We'll store only the path for scraping.

variantPrices.title: Variant Prices
variantPrices.description: Manage the pricing for this variant. Mark a price as active to use it.
variantPrices.empty: No prices added yet. Click "Add Price" to create one.

inventory.title: Inventory Stock
inventory.description: Manage stock levels across different locations
inventory.noLocations: No locations available. Please create locations first.

variantEditForm.scheduledActivationHelp: The variant will become active automatically at this date & time.

messages.scrapedAllStores: Scraped prices for all stores with URLs.

errors.invalidStoreUrl: Please set a valid URL before scraping.
errors.gatoArcanoUrlMissing: No GatoArcano URL was found in store links for this variant.
errors.fetchPhysicalAttributes: Failed to extract physical attributes from GatoArcano
errors.noPhysicalAttributes: No physical attributes were found on the GatoArcano page.

variantMediaEditor.title: Variant Media
variantMediaEditor.description: Manage images and videos specific to this variant

variantMediaEditor.uploadMediaFirst: Upload media in the Media Gallery first
variantMediaEditor.confirmRemoveMedia: Remove this media from the variant?

locations.title: Storage Locations
locations.description: Manage warehouses, stores, and other inventory locations
locations.locationsTotal: {count, plural, one {# location} other {# locations}} total
locations.createDescription: Add a new inventory location where stock can be tracked.

locations.name: Name
locations.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Primary warehouse for storing board games
locations.codeHint: Unique identifier for this location. Typically uppercase with dashes.
locations.countryHint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. CL, US, ES)
locations.noLocations: No inventory locations found. Add your first location!
locations.codeNameRequired: Code, name, address, city, and country are required

guideCategories.pageDescription: Manage guide categories for organizing content.
guideCategories.deleteCategoryDescription: This action cannot be undone. Guides in this category will need to be reassigned.

guides.editGuideDescription: Update guide content, blocks, and product associations
guides.title: Title
guides.subtitle: Subtitle
guides.titlePlaceholder: e.g., How to Set Up Your Board Game
guides.basicInfoDescription: Guide title, slug, category, and basic metadata

guides.contentDescription: Write the main content and introduction for this guide
guides.seoSettingsDescription: Optimize guide visibility in search engines
guides.guideBlocksDescription: Organize your guide content into reusable blocks

guides.deleteBlockDescription: Remove this content block from the guide. This action cannot be undone.

guides.noBlocks: No content blocks yet. Add your first block to get started.

guides.noVariants: No product variants linked yet. Add your first variant to get started.
